Contact us
Medical-technology R&D · Shenzhen

We invent clinical-grade medical devices.

Myelin Cloud is a medical-technology R&D company. We develop original medical devices, protect them with a layered patent portfolio, build the consumables and data platforms around them, and validate everything with objective clinical evidence. Our first device is Histo-Cooling.

Explore Histo-Cooling Partner & invest
01What we do

From invention to evidence, under one roof

Device R&D, intellectual property, consumables, and clinical validation, all held to one clinical and scientific standard.

Device R&D

We invent and prototype clinical-grade medical devices, from the underlying biology up.

Intellectual property

Every device is protected by a layered patent family across method, hardware, and data.

Medical consumables

We develop the consumables and disinfectable parts that turn a device into a repeatable clinical protocol.

Clinical validation

We run objective, controlled studies with standardized imaging and blinded grading, so claims hold up.

Where we started →
02Projects

Our first device: Histo-Cooling

Histo-Cooling is a sealed device that watches for scratching during sleep, cools the skin when it flares, and keeps a clinical-grade signed record of every episode. Built for research into atopic dermatitis, chronic urticaria, and similar night-time-itch conditions.

Explore Histo-Cooling

More devices, consumables, and patents are in development.

03Core Technology

Three interlocking layers

A · Method

Closed-loop method

Sleep state machine, frequency-domain scratch detection, a closed-loop response sequence, and event-to-endpoint mapping.

B · Hardware

Hermetic cooling

Thermoelectric cooling, a liquid-metal thermal bus, and a PCM buffer; no fan, no pump; IP68, disinfectable.

C · Data & safety

Trustworthy data

Hard-coded safety envelope, sham mode for double-blinding, device signing, offline export, and fault-tolerant storage.

See the full technology
04Vision

An ascending arc of value

We measure our impact from one patient’s single night all the way up to a standard a whole field can share.

PATIENTS

Outcomes, measured

Devices that objectively measure what matters and act on it, toward real quality-of-life gains.

INDUSTRY

Objective endpoints

Reproducible objective endpoints and instruments for research, and import substitution for trial hardware.

NATION

Locally controlled devices

Local data and self-controlled devices that raise the credibility and voice of Chinese clinical research.

WORLD

Open method standards

Objective, reproducible methods opened to global research, so patients everywhere benefit from one shared standard.

Every device we build, built on evidence →
05IP & Moat

A layered patent wall behind every device

Intellectual property is core to how we build. Every device gets a layered patent family across method, hardware, and data. Below is the Histo-Cooling family, and the template for what follows.

IP & Moat →

Let us turn filings into products

We are raising seed funding and seeking R&D, clinical, and industry partnerships. Investors, incubators, research centers, and industry partners welcome.

Disclaimer: The product described (Histo-Cooling) is under development and has not obtained medical device registration from China’s NMPA. All technical and functional descriptions on this site are for technical, investment, and partnership communication only, and do not constitute a medical device advertisement, an offer of sale, or any diagnostic or treatment advice. Patent status is subject to the official records of the CNIPA.
